mission.title: netdata: Collect MongoDB sharding metrics
mission.description: Collect MongoDB sharding metrics. Requested by 9+ users.

steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata -v
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
Hi all, I am comparing netdata module for MongoDB and [mongo exporter for prometheus](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/blob/master/README.md).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Collect MongoDB sharding metrics
steps.description:
Ok, i did some research, i read [percona](https://www.percona.com/) [mongodb exporter](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter) code

The source is trustable

#### how it works:
 - detects node type
 - [collects metrics based on node
```yaml
[ilyam@pc collector]$ grep "commoncollector" -R mongos/* mongod/* mongodb_collector.go 
mongos/server_status.go:	commoncollector "github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common"
mongos/server_status.go:	commoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:",inline"`
mongod/server_status.go:	commoncollector "github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common"
mongod/server_status.go:	commoncollector.ServerStatus `bson:",inline"`
mongodb_collector.go:	commoncollector "github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/collector/common"
mongodb_collector.go:		connPoolStats := commoncollector.GetConnPoolStats(client)
mong
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Collect MongoDB sharding metrics" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Ok, i did some research, i read [percona](https://www.percona.com/) [mongodb exporter](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter) code

The source is trustable

#### how it works:
 - detects node type
 - [collects metrics based on node type](https://github.com/percona/mongodb_exporter/blob/1f6c288104a069ad57811c7552f4d4b451f9567b/collector/mongodb_collector.go#L227-L237)

#### Node types:
 -
